items.quote: We waren in Nederland voor de bruiloft van goede vrienden en hadden de kans om te slapen in deze prachtige nieuwe B&B. De locatie is geniaal gezien het aan de Utrechtse Heuvelrug ligt in Maarsbergen en aan een groene bosrand. Het huis is fantastisch verbouwd door de eigenaar Emile en we hadden zelfs de kans om te genieten van een diner met de hosts Emile & Rachel.
items.author: Joep & Lotus - Spanje

items.quote: We traveled from Maine to visit family in Holland. We stayed on this sweet property, which proved to be the ideal accommodation for our family of four. We particularly appreciated the outdoor space, where we enjoyed our morning coffee daily. Furthermore, the hosts were incredibly gracious and offered excellent local recommendations and catering promptly to our needs. We highly recommend this rental for travelors!
items.author: Danielle, Spancer, Harbor & Reed - Maine USA

items.quote: We traveled all the way from Montana USA and we had a wonderful stay at this beautifully updated rental. The hosts were extremely accommodating and helpful. The location was private and clean. We will definitely come back and visit again !
items.author: Caroline, Tyler, Leo & Annika - Montana USA
